/usr/bin/c++    -Wall -Wextra -ffast-math -fopenmp -std=c++17 -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -msse2 -msse3 -mssse3 -fPIC -fopenmp -fPIC -fopenmp -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/tutorial-grabber-realsense-T265.dir/tutorial-grabber-realsense-T265.cpp.o -o tutorial-grabber-realsense-T265  -Wl,-rpath,/home/nguyen/visp-ws/visp/3rdparty/lib ../../lib/libvisp_vs.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_tt_mi.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_tt.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_mbt.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_klt.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_dnn_tracker.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_robot.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_imgproc.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_detection.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_ar.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_sensor.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_gui.so.3.7.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_video.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libv4l2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libv4lconvert.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdc1394.so ../../lib/libvisp_vision.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_visual_features.so.3.7.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.4d ../../lib/libvisp_me.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_blob.so.3.7.1 ../../lib/libvisp_io.so.3.7.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.4d ../../lib/libvisp_core.so.3.7.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblapack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcblas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libatlas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzbar.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_dnn.so.4.5.4d
